def _conv2d_kernel(x_ptr, w_ptr, b_ptr, out_ptr,
                   N, CIN, H, W, COUT, HOUT, WOUT, SP,
                   BLOCK: tl.constexpr, CIN_C: tl.constexpr,
                   KH_C: tl.constexpr, KW_C: tl.constexpr,
                   COUT_C: tl.constexpr):
